finding: ATM evidence/git commit closeout can still commit log-like JSONL evidence such as .atm/history/evidence/git-head.jsonl as part of a task delivery commit.
expectedBehavior: High-frequency or append-only statistics/log/readback streams should remain in gitignored runtime storage by default; Git history should keep compact task evidence, digests, and close summaries only.
evidenceOrRepro: ATM-GOV-0188 delivery commit 4083157505847f5a0b246c45fbb2574449c80d68 included .atm/history/evidence/git-head.jsonl after running npm run validate:git-head-evidence through the evidence/git commit path, despite the 2026-07-19 telemetry/log policy.
followUp: Add a governance rule and regression test that routes append-only JSONL evidence/log/stat streams to .atm/runtime or another gitignored local store, while preserving compact digest references in task evidence.
